eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: Scrollbar
eventsFunctionsExtensions.shortDescription: A scrollbar to help making a scroll view.
description: A scrollbar to help making a scroll view.
An example of scroll view can be found in the [multiplayer custom lobbies](https://wiki.gdevelop.io/gdevelop5/extensions/multiplayer-custom-lobbies/) extension.

eventsFunctions.description: Move the camera according to the scroll position.
eventsFunctions.name: SetCameraFromPosition
eventsFunctions.sentence: Move the camera of _PARAM2_ according to the scroll position of _PARAM1_

eventsFunctions.description: Change the scroll position according to the camera.
eventsFunctions.name: SetPositionFromCamera
eventsFunctions.sentence: Change the scroll position of _PARAM1_ according to the camera of _PARAM2_

eventsBasedObjects.description: A scrollbar to help making a scroll view.
eventsBasedObjects.name: Scrollbar

events.comment: Make sure the ScrollPosition don't go over the limit when the limit when the parent is resized.

eventsFunctions.description: Update the thumb position.
eventsFunctions.name: UpdateThumbPosition

parameters: clamp(Background.Y(), Background.Y() + Background.Height() - Thumb.Height(), Background.Y() + ScrollPosition * (Background.Height() - Thumb.Height()) / (ContentLength - Background.Height()))

eventsFunctions.description: the top position of the displayed part.
eventsFunctions.name: ScrollPosition

eventsFunctions.description: the content length of the object. The length of the content to scroll. The scroll bar don't actually scroll the content. You have to do it yourself with camera actions.
eventsFunctions.name: ContentLength

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the thumb of the scrollbar is dragged.
eventsFunctions.name: IsThumbDragged

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the content is big enough to require scrolling.
eventsFunctions.name: IsScrollingRequired
eventsFunctions.sentence: The content of _PARAM0_ is big enough to require scrolling

propertyDescriptors.label: Content length
propertyDescriptors.description: The length of the content to scroll. The scroll bar don't actually scroll the content. You have to do it yourself with camera actions.
propertyDescriptors.name: ContentLength

propertyDescriptors.label: Hide the bar when the content is too small
propertyDescriptors.name: ShouldHideWhenUseless

eventsFunctionsExtensions.author: @ddabrahim
eventsFunctionsExtensions.fullName: Drag camera with the mouse (or touchscreen)
eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: DragCameraWithPointer
eventsFunctionsExtensions.shortDescription: Pan/drag camera with mouse or touch. Configurable inertia and bounds.
description: Move a camera by dragging the mouse (or touchscreen).
- Run this action on every frame that you want the camera to be movable by the mouse (or touchscreen)
- Select the mouse button to use (choose "left" for touchscreen)
- Select which directions the camera will move (vertical, horizontal, or both)
- Select the layer that will be moved
- If no parameters are selected, the camera will move in both directions when the left mouse button (or touchscreen) are dragged.

eventsFunctions.description: Move a camera by dragging the mouse (or touchscreen).
eventsFunctions.name: DragCameraWithPointer
eventsFunctions.sentence: Drag camera on layer _PARAM2_ in _PARAM3_ directions using _PARAM4_ mouse button

parameters.description: Directions that the camera can move (horizontal, vertical, both)
parameters.name: Direction

eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: PanelSpriteButton
description: A button that can be used for menus and most labelled buttons of a game. The button can be customized with a background for each state and a label. It handles user interactions and a simple condition can be used to check if it is clicked.
There are ready-to-use buttons in the asset-store [menu buttons pack](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?initial-dialog=asset-store&asset-pack=menu-buttons-menu-buttons).

changelog.breaking: - Buttons now use "variants", allowing easy swapping of their visual aspect. You will have to make some adjustments to existing buttons in your project. Follow this [migration documentation](https://wiki.gdevelop.io/gdevelop5/objects/custom-objects-prefab-template/migrate-to-variants/) to do these changes.

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the events are running for the editor.
eventsFunctions.name: IsInGameEdition
eventsFunctions.sentence: Events are running for the editor

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: The finite state machine used internally by the button object.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonFSM

events.comment: The "Validated" state only last one frame.
Make sure the cursor position is only checked once per frame.
Touches are always pressed, so ShouldCheckHovering doesn't matter.

eventsFunctions.description: Reset the state of the button.
eventsFunctions.name: ResetState

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is not used.
eventsFunctions.name: IsIdle

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button was just clicked.
eventsFunctions.name: IsClicked

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the cursor is hovered over the button.
eventsFunctions.name: IsHovered

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is either hovered or pressed but not hovered.
eventsFunctions.name: IsFocused

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is currently being pressed with mouse or touch.
eventsFunctions.name: IsPressed

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is currently being pressed outside with mouse or touch.
eventsFunctions.name: IsPressedOutside

eventsFunctions.description: the touch id that is using the button or 0 if none.
eventsFunctions.name: TouchId

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Change the text style when the button is hovered.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: TextStyleState

eventsFunctions.description: Check if isHovered.
eventsFunctions.name: IsHovered

eventsFunctions.description: Change if isHovered.
eventsFunctions.name: SetIsHovered

eventsFunctions.description: Return the text color

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Change the text style when the button is hovered.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: BitmapTextStyleState

eventsFunctions.description: Check if isHovered.
eventsFunctions.name: IsHovered

eventsFunctions.description: Change if isHovered.
eventsFunctions.name: SetIsHovered

eventsFunctions.description: Return the text color
eventsFunctions.name: Color

events.comment:
Create one background instance for of each state.
Only the instance for the current state is shown.
Show the right background accordingly to the new state.

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is not used.

eventsFunctions.name: IsFocused

eventsFunctions.description: Change the text of the button label.

eventsFunctions.description: the label text.
eventsFunctions.name: LabelText

eventsFunctions.description: De/activate interactions with the button.
eventsFunctions.name: Activate

eventsFunctions.name: IsActivated

eventsFunctions.name: LabelOffset

propertyDescriptors.name: PressedLabelOffsetY

eventsFunctionsExtensions.author: Arthur Pacaud (arthuro555)
eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: SpriteMasking
eventsFunctionsExtensions.shortDescription: Mask objects using a sprite or a Shape Painter.
eventsFunctionsExtensions.description: When masked, the masked object is only visible through the mask.

eventsFunctions.description: Define a shape painter as a mask of an object.
eventsFunctions.fullName: Mask an object with a shape painter
eventsFunctions.name: MaskWithShapePainter

parameters.description: Shape painter to use as a mask
parameters.name: Mask

eventsFunctions.description: Define a sprite as a mask of an object.
eventsFunctions.fullName: Mask an object with a sprite
eventsFunctions.name: Mask

parameters.description: Sprite object to use as a mask
parameters.name: Mask

eventsFunctions.description: Remove the mask of the specified object.
eventsFunctions.name: Unmask

parameters.description: Object with a mask to remove
parameters.name: Masked
